scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute llm-arcade-votes --local --file db/migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute llm-arcade-votes --local --file db/migrations/0002_seed_mario.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute llm-arcade-votes --remote --file db/migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute llm-arcade-votes --remote --file db/migrations/0002_seed_mario.sql
